queries.question: Which interior designers are minimalists and which landscape architects have the same style?
queries.sql:
SELECT Interior_Designers.Name
FROM Interior_Designers
WHERE Interior_Designers.Style = "Minimalism"
UNION
SELECT Landscape_Architects.Name
FROM Landscape_Architects
WHERE Landscape_Architects.Style = "Minimalism"

queries.question: Show minimalist landscape architects and interior designers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Interior_Designers.Name
FROM Interior_Designers
UNION
SELECT Landscape_Architects.Name
FROM Landscape_Architects
WHERE Landscape_Architects.Style = "Minimalism"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show minimalist landscape architects and interior designers.
